title: Is Unstructured Data The Key To Successful AI Deployments?
summary: A discussion featuring Hyland leadership and Erie Insurance executives arguing that unstructured data is critical for successful AI deployments in enterprise contexts. The conversation covers how Hyland helps customers leverage unstructured data for agentic AI systems that provide agents with relevant context to drive business value.
writeup: A conversation with Hyland leadership and Erie Insurance executives making the case that unstructured data is central to successful enterprise AI deployments. It covers how Hyland works with customers to surface unstructured data for agentic AI systems, supplying agents with relevant context intended to drive business value. The discussion touches on multi-agent systems and tabular data as part of the broader enterprise picture.
